full_text:
Raolong Zong 擾龍宗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Raolong Zong (擾龍宗). Delivering a report, he forgot to take off his sword and was killed by Dong Zhuo. Raolong Zong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Raolong Zong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
